Class UIUtils

java.lang.Object
martin.viewtool.utils.UIUtils
public class UIUtils extends Object
Utility class with helper methods for common Swing UI operations.
Author:
cesar

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Font
    BOLD_FONT
    Bold Segoe UI font at size 13.
    static final Font
    PLAIN_FONT
    Plain Segoe UI font at size 13.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ImageIcon
    getFixedSizeIcon(String imageName, int ancho, int alto)
    Loads an image from the /images/ classpath resource folder and scales it to the specified dimensions.
    void
    setHoverButton(JButton button)
    Adds a mouse listener to the button that switches the cursor to a hand when the pointer enters the button area.
    void
    showFeedback(JLabel infoLabel, String message, boolean isError)
    Displays a temporary feedback message on a label and clears it after 5 seconds.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • BOLD_FONT

      public static final Font BOLD_FONT
      Bold Segoe UI font at size 13.

    • PLAIN_FONT

      public static final Font PLAIN_FONT
      Plain Segoe UI font at size 13.

  • Constructor Details

    • UIUtils

      public UIUtils()

  • Method Details

    • getFixedSizeIcon

      public ImageIcon getFixedSizeIcon(String imageName, int ancho, int alto)
      Loads an image from the /images/ classpath resource folder and scales it to the specified dimensions.
      Parameters:
      imageName - file name of the image
      ancho - desired width in pixels
      alto - desired height in pixels
      Returns:
      scaled ImageIcon

    • showFeedback

      public void showFeedback(JLabel infoLabel, String message, boolean isError)
      Displays a temporary feedback message on a label and clears it after 5 seconds.
      Parameters:
      infoLabel - the label to update
      message - message text to display
      isError - if true the text is shown in red, otherwise in black

    • setHoverButton

      public void setHoverButton(JButton button)
      Adds a mouse listener to the button that switches the cursor to a hand when the pointer enters the button area.
      Parameters:
      button - the button to configure
